 = true
simulateModel("TRANSFORM.HeatExchangers.Examples.WaterWater_STHX_withMass",stopTime=1000,numberOfIntervals=1000,method="Esdirk45a",tolerance=0.0001,resultFile="dsres");

Note: 
Your model is using an outer "systemTF" component but
an inner "systemTF" component is not defined.
For simulation drag TRANSFORM.Fluid.SystemTF into your model
to specify system properties.
